description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:10 Docker image. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that caches node_modules/, runs yarn install, then yarn test -- --coverage, and finally yarn run eslint src. In the deploy stage add a pages job that also caches node_modules/, runs yarn install, yarn build, removes any existing public directory, moves the build output to public, publishes the public/ folder as a Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. The pipeline should publish the built site via GitLab Pages.
